Excellent! Now I have gathered comprehensive information. Let me compile a detailed report of all the findings.

## Easy Salon Landing Page & Frontend Codebase - Complete Analysis

I've thoroughly explored the Easy Salon project landing page and frontend codebase. Here's what I found:

---

## 1. MAIN LANDING PAGE & CORE STRUCTURE

### Landing Page Component
**File:** `/frontend/src/pages/Index.tsx`

The landing page is minimal and serves as a hub/redirect page with:
- Simple hero with gradient text ("Easy Salon")
- Login/Register buttons
- Demo area links (Admin & Salon)
- Gradient background (purple to blue)

### App Entry Point
**File:** `/frontend/src/App.tsx`

Manages:
- Route configuration (lazy-loaded pages)
- Global providers (Auth, WebSocket, Query Client, Sonner toaster)
- Subscription state management
- Fallback UI (404, loading states)

---

## 2. SECTION COMPONENTS STRUCTURE

The project uses a **component-driven architecture** without explicit "Hero", "Features", "Pricing" sections. Instead:

### Main Layout Components
- `/frontend/src/components/layout/MainLayout.tsx` - Main wrapper
- `/frontend/src/components/layout/EasySalonLayout.tsx` - Dashboard layout
- `/frontend/src/components/layout/Header.tsx` - Global header
- `/frontend/src/components/layout/SideNav.tsx` - Sidebar navigation
- `/frontend/src/components/layout/PageHeader.tsx` - Page-level header

### Booking Flow Components (Customer-Facing)
Located in `/frontend/src/components/booking/`:
- `BookingWelcome.tsx` - Step 1: Welcome screen
- `ServiceSelection.tsx` - Step 2: Service selection
- `ProfessionalSelection.tsx` - Step 3: Professional selection
- `DateTimeSelection.tsx` - Step 4: Date/time picker
- `CustomerForm.tsx` - Step 5: Customer info
- `BookingConfirmation.tsx` - Step 6: Confirmation
- `BookingReceipt.tsx` - Final receipt

### Shared UI Component Library
**Directory:** `/frontend/src/components/ui/`

Contains 60+ shadcn/ui based components:
- `button.tsx`, `card.tsx`, `input.tsx`, `label.tsx`, `select.tsx`
- `dialog.tsx`, `drawer.tsx`, `alert.tsx`, `badge.tsx`
- `accordion.tsx`, `tabs.tsx`, `table.tsx`, `data-table.tsx`
- `calendar.tsx`, `date-picker-with-selects.tsx`
- Custom: `EasyCalendar/`, `loading-spinner.tsx`, `empty.tsx`, `MobileBottomSheet.tsx`

---

## 3. DESIGN SYSTEM & TOKENS

### CSS/Styling Approach: **Tailwind CSS with HSL Design Tokens**

**File:** `/frontend/src/index.css`

#### Official Easy Salon Color Palette (HSL Format):

```css
/* Primary */
--primary: 7 61% 51%;        /* #CE4836 - Easy Salon Red (brand color) */
--primary-foreground: 0 0% 98.4%;  /* #FBFBFB */

/* Backgrounds */
--background: 45 33% 97.6%;  /* #FBFAF7 - Primary background */
--card: 0 0% 98.4%;          /* #FBFBFB - Cards/sidebar */
--foreground: 0 0% 27.8%;    /* #474747 - Primary text */

/* Secondary Colors */
--secondary: 28 25% 95.3%;   /* #f5f2ed - Light beige */
--secondary-foreground: 0 0% 27.8%;  /* #474747 */

/* Tertiary */
--tertiary: 34 25% 90.2%;    /* #ede7d9 - Light tan */

/* States */
--success: 91 46% 50%;       /* #7DBA44 - Green success */
--destructive: 7 61% 51%;    /* #CE4836 - Red error */
--muted: 60 2% 89%;          /* #E4E4E3 - Light gray */
--muted-foreground: 0 0% 56.9%;  /* #919191 - Medium gray */

/* UI Elements */
--border: 34 25% 90.2%;      /* #EDE7D9 - Border color */
--input: 34 25% 90.2%;       /* #EDE7D9 - Input border */
--ring: 7 61% 51%;           /* Focus ring - Primary red */

/* Radius */
--radius: 0.875rem;          /* 14px - All buttons and cards */
```

### Typography System
```javascript
// From tailwind.config.ts
fontSize: {
  'page-title': ['20px', { lineHeight: '28px' }],    // H1 - Page titles
  'section-title': ['18px', { lineHeight: '24px' }], // H2 - Section/card titles
  'body': ['13px', { lineHeight: '20px' }],          // Body text & lists
  'button': ['12px', { lineHeight: '20px' }],        // Buttons & labels
}

fontFamily: {
  'inter': ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
  'sans': ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
}
```

### Component Style Classes
```css
.salon-button { height: 11; padding-x: 6; border-radius: 0.5rem; }
.salon-button-primary { background: #CE4836; }
.salon-button-secondary { border: 1px solid #CE4836; }
.salon-input { height: 38px; border-radius: 10px; }
.salon-card { border-radius: 3rem; /* 48px */ }
.salon-table-header { background: #EDE7D9; }
.salon-badge-active { background: #E5F7D1; color: #3B6D11; }
.salon-badge-inactive { background: #FFDCD8; color: #CE4836; }
```

---

## 4. DESIGN SYSTEM PAGE (Component Reference)

**File:** `/frontend/src/pages/DesignSystemPage.tsx` (700+ lines)

Showcases:
- All 60+ UI components with previews
- Interactive examples (buttons, cards, tables, modals, etc.)
- Icon library (100+ lucide-react icons)
- Props documentation
- Code snippets
- Color palette visualization

**URL:** `/design-system` (when app is running)

---

## 5. SHARED UI COMPONENTS LIBRARY

### Base shadcn/ui Components (All in `/frontend/src/components/ui/`)
- **Form components:** Input, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio-group, Switch, Select, Label
- **Displays:** Badge, Avatar, Skeleton, Empty, Loading-spinner
- **Containers:** Card, Alert, Popover, Hover-card, Tooltip
- **Navigation:** Tabs, Breadcrumb, Pagination, Dropdown-menu, Navigation-menu
- **Interaction:** Button, Toggle, Slider, Progress, Carousel
- **Dialogs:** Dialog, Drawer, Alert-dialog
- **Tables:** Table, Data-table, Responsive-pagination
- **Calendar:** Calendar, Date-picker-with-selects
- **Advanced:** Accordion, Collapsible, Command, Context-menu, Sheet, Sidebar

### Custom Components Built on Top
- **EasyCalendar/** - Professional calendar for agenda (custom built)
  - `EasyCalendar.tsx` - Main component
  - `ProfessionalColumn.tsx` - Column per professional
  - `TimeGrid.tsx` - Time slot grid
  - `EventBlock.tsx` - Appointment event display
  - `types.ts` - Type definitions

- **MobileBottomSheet.tsx** - Mobile-optimized bottom sheet
- **LoadingSpinner.tsx** - Custom loading indicator
- **Empty.tsx** - Empty state component
- **CurrencyInput.tsx** - Currency formatting input
- **PasswordInput.tsx** - Password field with toggle
- **PercentageInput.tsx** - Percentage input
- **UserAvatar.tsx** - User avatar with fallback

---

## 6. DESIGN SYSTEM ASSETS & TOKENS

### Configuration Files
**Location:** `/frontend/`

1. **tailwind.config.ts** - Tailwind theme configuration
   - Color definitions (HSL variables)
   - Typography extensions
   - Border radius customization
   - Sidebar-specific variables
   - Animation keyframes

2. **index.css** - Global styles layer
   - CSS variables (HSL colors)
   - Dark mode support
   - Base typography utilities
   - Component-level classes (salon-*)
   - Modal behavior utilities
   - iOS Safari fixes

3. **postcss.config.js** - PostCSS pipeline

### Icons Library
- **Provider:** lucide-react (v0.577.0)
- **100+ icons** registered in DesignSystemPage.tsx
- Used across all components (navigation, buttons, indicators)

### Theme Support
- Light mode (default)
- Dark mode (CSS class-based)
- Mobile-responsive design

---

## 7. SHARED TYPES PACKAGE

**Location:** `/packages/shared-types/`

TypeScript definitions shared between frontend and backend:

```typescript
// src/ (TS source files - compiled to dist/)
- appointment.types.ts
- auth.types.ts
- booking.types.ts
- cielo.types.ts (payment provider)
- client.types.ts
- dashboard.types.ts
- onboarding.types.ts
- request.types.ts
- salon.types.ts
- service.types.ts
- subscription.types.ts
```

Imported in frontend as: `import { ... } from '@easy-salon/shared-types'`

---

## 8. PROJECT STRUCTURE SUMMARY

```
frontend/src/
├── components/
│   ├── ui/                    (60+ shadcn/ui components)
│   ├── layout/                (MainLayout, Header, Sidebar, etc.)
│   ├── booking/               (Multi-step booking flow)
│   ├── forms/                 (Form components)
│   ├── modals/                (Dialog modals)
│   ├── admin/                 (Admin-specific components)
│   ├── salon/                 (Salon-specific components)
│   ├── agenda/                (Calendar/agenda components)
│   └── services/              (Service-specific components)
├── pages/
│   ├── Index.tsx              (Landing page)
│   ├── DesignSystemPage.tsx   (Component showcase)
│   ├── Login.tsx, Register.tsx
│   ├── admin/                 (Admin pages)
│   ├── salon/                 (Salon management pages)
│   └── onboarding/            (Setup flow)
├── types/
│   ├── api.ts, auth.ts, booking.ts, user.ts, etc.
├── contexts/                  (AuthContext, WebSocketProvider, etc.)
├── services/                  (API clients, mock services)
├── hooks/                     (Custom React hooks)
├── constants/                 (timezones, user roles, passwords)
├── lib/                       (Utilities, helpers)
├── assets/                    (Images, fonts)
├── index.css                  (Global styles + design tokens)
├── App.tsx                    (Main app component)
└── main.tsx                   (React entry point)
```

---

## 9. KEY STYLING FRAMEWORK DETAILS

### Tailwind CSS Setup
- **Version:** 3.4.11
- **Content scanning:** `src/**/*.{ts,tsx}`
- **Dark mode:** Class-based (`darkMode: ["class"]`)
- **Plugins:** tailwindcss-animate
- **Prefix:** None (empty string)
- **Important utility:** Uses HSL CSS variables for all colors

### CSS Variable Strategy (HSL)
- All colors use `hsl(var(--color-name))` pattern
- Enables smooth light/dark mode switching
- Responsive to color token changes without code recompilation

---

## 10. DEPENDENCIES & LIBRARIES

**Key Libraries:**
- React 18.3.1 + TypeScript
- Vite 5.4.1 (build tool)
- shadcn/ui (component library)
- Radix UI (primitives foundation)
- Tailwind CSS 3.4.11
- TanStack Query 5.56.2 (data fetching)
- React Router DOM 6.26.2
- Framer Motion 12.34.0 (animations)
- Recharts 2.12.7 (charts)
- Socket.io-client (real-time)
- Zod 3.23.8 (validation)
- React Hook Form 7.53.0 (forms)
- Sonner 1.7.4 (toast notifications)

---

## SUMMARY TABLE

| Category | Details |
